MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-15-25 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-15-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JAY EPPS' MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE PROPOSITION 65 REQUIREMENTS FOR SETTLEMENTS, ADDRESSES THE CONCERNS OF THE PRIOR ORDER, AND IS NOT OPPOSED BY THE ATTORNEY GENERAL. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER AND PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED. CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/HEK).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JAY EPPS' Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Granted. No opposition filed. The settlement complies with the Proposition 65 requirements for settlements, addresses the concerns of the prior order, and is not opposed by the Attorney General. The court will sign the proposed order and proposed consent judgment.

Order signed. Consent judgment signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JAY EPPS' Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Jay Epps's motion for approval of Proposition 65 Settlement and for entry of consent judgment is denied.

[SEE WORD MINTUES FOR COMPLETE MINUTES]

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RCE)
